headline: U.S. Treasury lets Russian oil waiver expire amid $100 crude pressures
summary: Investing.com -- The Trump administration allowed a key sanctions waiver to lapse on Saturday, halting a mechanism that had previously permitted nations, including India, to legally purchase Russian seaborne crude oil.

content.title: U.S. Treasury lets Russian oil waiver expire amid $100 crude pressures

headline: Assessing Colgate (CL) Valuation After Strong Q1 Beat And 63rd Straight Dividend Increase
summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) stock has been in focus after Q1 2026 results topped expectations, with revenue up 8.4% year over year, adjusted EPS at $0.97, and free cash flow rising alongside another dividend increase. See our latest analysis for Colgate-Palmolive. At a share price of $88.13, Colgate-Palmolive has seen a 5.56% 1 month share price return but is still down 8.83% over 3 months. The 3 year total shareholder return of 18.36% suggests steady long term compounding despite short term...
